name: Sprint Retro Diff
persona: A delivery-focused product manager at a 30–150 person org running two-week sprints who needs a credible sprint-to-sprint retro narrative without BI support
problem_statement: Retrospectives often turn sprint performance into a vibes-based story because velocity, scope churn, and blockers live in separate artifacts with no consistent attribution rubric
artifact_type: multi-step wizard that generates a retro-ready comparison report (Markdown + JSON export)
